quotes_used.text: Switching soon. Getting rid of "liked songs" playlist was the breaking point. They keep changing to the "improved" UI, give people a choice as to what UI they want to use. Forcing me to use the glitchy garbage 4x2 widget instead of the 4x1 that worked fine was the last straw. Done paying for this garbage.
when I listen songs so song doesn't start play instead ads come after every singel song so disgusting 🙂

una feel say person dey pluck money from tree bah?? I pay for premium, I was debited on the 2nd of June or so. At just June 15th or there about, una dey talk say payment failed, like una wan debit me again?? I decided to just cancel the subscription. Normally, if you cancel subscription, you'll be able to use it for the rest of the month but noooooo. As I cancelled the subscription, una nor waste time, una jejely kick me out. Make una sufree oh 😠😠
Absolutely HORRIBLE, what do you mean you have to pay to change songs? Stop being greedy spotify

Spotify has lost its value due to their Greed. It's an Advertisement app with over control of users, we listen to the same songs repeatedly, unwanted songs in between and don't listen to our play list songs at all. Waste of time, using this app, subscription price is really high.
too many adds, I ain't interested in yo premiums,, plus you deleted all my fav episode and podcast😠

This app is completely unusable if you don't pay them 12 dollars a month. It takes away basic functions of a music app and locks it behind a paywall. There are more ads than necessary. One time I got 5 minutes of straight ads just for another ad to play after one song. 90% of the time ads play after every two songs.

I used to really like this app until today I pay for premium and have given them lots of money and I got in to use this app and it says you have to confirm your age what kinda BS is that I cant even use a app that I pay for until I do some stupid BS
App completely locked me out saying I need to confirm my age despite the fact that Google says my account is already age verified.
preventing me from using the app unless I do age verification? guess I'll just uninstall and tell my bank to block all charges
it doesn't allow me to choose songs without premium and i cant skip a song this has to be fixed pls and thank u

be for real, they need premium just to download a song? you can't even make re-tag the music, this update is piss me off, and they added many add, and they added something that you can play only one song. only one, and play tomorrow 😒. I suggest remove the limitations and adds.

Spotify's free experience has become very frustrating. There are too many unskippable ads, sometimes 3–5 in a row, and basic features like song selection, repeat, and proper shuffle are locked behind Premium. Earlier, the free version was limited but still enjoyable. Now it feels like almost everything requires payment. I'm seriously considering switching to another app. If this continues, Spotify may end up driving loyal users away.
ads ads ads all it has

when I try to play one song it ends up being an album instead and I have to wait so long and listen to songs I hate just to listen to the song I searched up and sometimes it doesn't even have the song in it I just want to listen to the song 😔

This app is increasingly trash. Loading is often painfully slow. The new widget is completely dysfunctional. And the Blend algorithm seems to think that if I listen to a song one time, I automatically love it. Also, I wish I could set a specific playlist to skip explicit songs for my kid, instead of having to set that for my whole account every time.

I love it, I really do. but why is it so bad to use without premium. LIKE WHY DO I HAVE TO GET PREMIUM JUST TO UNSHUFFLE MY PLAYLIST AND GET MORE SKIPS!? and why can't I go back to a different song!? IT'S SO CONFUSING!!!!! that's why I use something else, but Spotify is good for stuff like audios because yt music didn't have the goods. overall JUST GIVE US POOR PEOPLE MORE STUFF!!!!
